# PT Panca Prima Wijaya - Crop Protection, Fumigation & IoT Monitoring Systems

PT Panca Prima Wijaya is Indonesia's leading agricultural crop protection and warehousing solution provider. We specialize in post-harvest grain protection, high-efficiency warehouse sanitation, professional fumigation services, and state-of-the-art technological warning systems (IoT, BMS, EWS, RTMS).

## Key Offerings & Services

- **Agricultural Crop Protection**: Premium formulations including FUMIPHOS® phosphine fumigant, SILOGUD® 250 EC warehouse insecticide, and premium agricultural pest management tools.
- **Fumigation & Warehouse Sanitation**: Professional fumigation services for agricultural commodities, shipping containers, and large-scale cargo vessel sanitation.
- **Precision IoT Monitoring & Core Warning Automation**:
  - **Early Warning System (EWS)**: Dynamic real-time sensing of warehouse environment indicators.
  - **Real Time Monitoring System (RTMS)**: Active status telemetry for critical process validation.
  - **Building Management System (BMS)**: Smart facilities administration, HVAC optimization, and electrical monitoring.
  - **Toyo Elevator Automation**: Advanced components, heavy industrial lifts, and spare part integrations.

## Navigation & Core Resources

### Indonesian Language Path
- [Beranda Panca Prima Wijaya](/panca) - Crop protection and post-harvest information.
- [Katalog Produk & E-Commerce](/panca/produk) - View and purchase pest control and fumigation products.
- [Layanan Fumigasi Profesional](/layanan) - Safe port and warehouse sanitations.
- [Sistem Sensor IoT & Monitoring](/sensor) - Dynamic smart control solutions dashboard.
- [Katalog Produk Sensor](/sensor/produk) - Smart sensors, industrial spare parts, and Toyo systems.
- [Artikel Edukasi & Blog](/blog) - In-depth articles regarding crop protection and pest containment.
- [Tentang Kami](/tentang-kami) - Corporate profile, vision, and accreditation details.
